one_sentence_summary: This paper proposes an agentic pipeline for literature review automation.
research_problem: How to automate paper retrieval, reading, and review generation.
core_method: Agent workflow with retrieval, filtering, and brief generation.
key_innovations: Combines retrieval and structured review artifacts.
relation_to_user_idea: Directly aligned with the workflow goal.
open_questions: How much of the full paper should be read automatically?
